name: Fruity Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Box AM Muffin Mix (Apple Spice Oat Bran)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a separate bowl, stir the grated orange rind into the beaten egg (optional).
3. In another bowl, combine the honey, vanilla, and water until well mixed.
4. Add the sesame oil to the fruit and nut mixture.
5. Gradually incorporate the liquid ingredients into the dry mix.
6. Pour the final batter into a greased 9-inch x 5-inch pan.
7. Bake for 45 minutes or until set.
